title: Filter boards by folder_id

posts.author: Ramalho (M. Ramalho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to filter boards by folder_id in a single query?
Something like this
query {
board {
board_folder_id (ids: 123456)
…

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Ramalho and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, that is not possible to do in a query.

Hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
